description: Create a Talon voice command module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\evidence_verifier\ to verify digital evidence files by their SHA256 hashes against a manifest. The module must include a user.evidence_id list in evidence_ids.talon-list with mappings for 'alpha' (email_dump.txt), 'bravo' (network_trace.pcap), and 'charlie' (system_config.ini). Implement a Python action user.verify_evidence(evidence_id) in evidence_verifier.py that reads C:\workspace\data\evidence\manifest.csv (Headers: EvidenceID,Filename,ExpectedSHA256), computes the SHA256 hash of the corresponding file in C:\workspace\data\evidence\, and compares it to the expected value. The action should use actions.app.notify to display the status (VERIFIED or CORRUPTED) and append a log entry to C:\workspace\data\evidence\audit_log.txt in the format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS, <EvidenceID>, <Filename>, <ComputedHash>, <VERIFIED|CORRUPTED>. Define the voice command "verify evidence {user.evidence_id}" in evidence_verifier.talon to execute the verification action.
